code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API
    participant notification_queue as NotificationHandler.java Lambda   
    participant notify as Notify   
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Decrypt and validate request and create session    
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (FinTech_LedgerService)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Checks if account with email already exists
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (FinTech_AuthVault)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates if password is correct
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-recovery (FinTech_LedgerService)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Calculates whether account recovery is permitted
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountRecovery.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /mfa (FinTech_FraudDetection)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates and stores OTP
    auth_internal_api -->> notification_queue : Sends NotifyRequest.java object via SQS
    notification_queue -->> notify : Request to send SMS containing OTP and phone number
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : 204 response 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /verify-code (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates whether SMS MFA code is valid
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: 204 response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的OAuth 2.0授权流程时序图，核心是展示当用户账户被Account Interventions API拦截时的完整链路。起点是Orchestration层，终点是用户看到拦截页面。
明白，这个流程涉及几个内部服务？我看到有Authentication Frontend和Authentication Internal API，还有外部的Account Interventions API？
对，前端是Authentication Frontend，它背后是Authentication Internal API做实际业务处理。Account Interventions API是独立的拦截服务，还有NotificationHandler.java Lambda用于发通知。
好的，我先画出参与者：Orchestration、Authentication Frontend、Authentication External API、Authentication Internal API、Account Interventions API、NotificationHandler.java Lambda、还有Notify服务。
流程开始：Orchestration发起OAuth 2.0授权请求，302重定向到Authentication Frontend的/authorize端点。然后Frontend要解密验证请求并创建session。
画好了起始部分。接下来Frontend调用Internal API的/start接口，这里标注一下是FinTech_LedgerService？
是的，Internal API自己处理Start helps calculate current state，然后返回StartResponse.java对象。Frontend拿到后由状态机决定下一步路由。
继续画：Frontend调用/user-exists检查用户是否存在，标注FinTech_TransactionQueue。Internal API检查email是否已有账户，返回CheckUserExistsResponse.java。
elements_involved: Checks if account with email already exists

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 关键拦截点来了：验证用户有账户后，Frontend请求/account-interventions，Internal API再转发到Account Interventions API。这里要体现FinTech_PaymentGateway和FinTech_TransactionQueue两个标注。
画好了：Account Interventions返回blocked=true，Internal API生成审计事件，然后返回AccountInterventions.java对象给Frontend。
elements_involved: Generates audit event for blocked Account Intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，这时候Frontend要阻止用户做密码重置。但流程还要继续走/login验证密码，标注FinTech_AuthVault，返回LoginResponse.java。
elements_involved: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 加上了。然后还有/account-recovery检查是否允许恢复，FinTech_LedgerService，返回AccountRecovery.java。
elements_involved: Calculates whether account recovery is permitted

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 接下来是MFA流程：Frontend请求/mfa，FinTech_FraudDetection，Internal API生成并存储OTP，然后通过SQS发送NotifyRequest.java给NotificationHandler.java Lambda。
Lambda调用Notify服务发SMS OTP，同时Internal API返回204给Frontend。这里要体现Frontend阻止MFA重置吗？
elements_involved: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 是的，虽然发了MFA，但因为blocked干预，Frontend要阻止MFA重置。然后用户还是可以提交验证码，Frontend调用/verify-code，FinTech_PaymentGateway。
elements_involved: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: Internal API验证SMS MFA code，返回204。最后Frontend显示Blocked intervention screen。这样整个流程就闭环了。
elements_involved: Validates whether SMS MFA code is valid

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 完美。这个图清晰展示了即使用户通过了身份验证和MFA，Account Interventions的blocked状态仍然会最终拦截用户，整个审计链路和通知链路都完整了。
elements_involved: Generates audit event for blocked Account Intervention
